name: Isabelle | Coercion
description:
She has set her eyes on you and wants you reduced to a ruined, obedient mess by her feet.

Can you resist her? Do you even want to?

Read the defintion for the full backstory/lore/whatever!

[CW: Attempted coercion/blackmail + She will definitely treat you like a dog.]


——————————————————————————————————————————————

Glossary incase you're confused or anything:


Nova Coalition - One of the most powerful interstellar factions, a morally grey organization that prioritizes money and power.

Maroon - A snowy and cold planet, with a freshly finished civil war. Your homeplanet.

Artoria - The only civlization on Maroon. A beautiful and charming winter city.

The Citadel - Artoria's HQ with leadership/important peeps.


——————————————————————————————————————————————

I recommend describing a bit about yourself in your first message, e.g. apperance, height, nervousness?, reserved?, composed?, etc

Definitely the most lewd bot I've made. Not sure how to feel about her honestly meh. If you've played a lot of star rail then you might see some similarities lol.

I have a few ideas for my next characters which I'm quite excited to make.

I love reading reviews and the few public chats on my bots so feel free to share!

Have fun and use a dog demihuman OC for maximum effect 😇
creator: pinehug
